description_long: This is a low-cut, casual brown leather sneaker with a white rubber sole, designed for everyday urban wear. The upper is crafted from textured brown leather with visible stitching and features a standard lace-up closure with dark eyelets and matching brown laces. The shoe has a rounded toe and a slightly padded collar for comfort, with a subtle brand tag on the side. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, dark material, likely fabric or synthetic, for added comfort. The sole is thick and flat, providing good support and grip for walking on city surfaces. Overall, the shoe combines a classic, versatile style with practical construction suitable for urban environments.
description: A brown leather lace-up sneaker with a white rubber sole, featuring visible stitching and a classic, casual design. The shoe is well-crafted for comfort and everyday urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown leather upper, white sole, and visible stitching with a brand tag on the side.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the rounded toe, lace-up closure, and the shoe's overall sleek profile.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the padded collar and the continuous leather texture around the heel.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the heel area, showing the low-cut design and subtle stitching details.
